faqs.Que: Is HTML standard?
faqs.Ans: No, it is not.

faqs.Que: What do you understand by HTML tags?
faqs.Ans: A set of characters enclosed within angular braces (<> or ) that develop a formatted command for a web page is called an HTML tag.

faqs.Que: Can a web page contain multiple header elements? What about footer elements?
faqs.Ans: Yes, to both. In fact, both the header and footer tags are designed to serve their respective purposes in relation to whatever their parent “section” may be. So not only can the page body contain a header and a footer, but so can every article and section element. In fact, a header should be present for all of these, although a footer is not always necessary.

faqs.Que: Is AngularJS a library, framework, plugin or a browser extension?
faqs.Ans: AngularJS is the best defined as framework. Even though it's much more lightweight than a typical framework and that's why many confuse it with a library.

faqs.Que: What is the difference between AngularJS and angular?
faqs.Ans: AngularJS is a JavaScript open-source front-end framework that is mainly used to develop single-page web applications (SPAs).  It is a popular open-source Typescript framework created by Google for developing web applications.

faqs.Que: Define Scope in AngularJS.
faqs.Ans: Scopes are special objects in AngularJS that act as a glue between the view and the controller. They refer to the model component of the MVC architecture.

faqs.Que: Which big companies use AngularJS?
faqs.Ans: Microsoft Office, Deutsche Bank, Gmail, Forbes, Upwork, PayPal, Grasshopper, Samsung and many more.

faqs.Que: How much does Vue.js Development cost?
faqs.Ans: The cost of Vue.js development depends on the complexity of your application, the features you need, the number of developers required, and the duration of the project. A detailed project brief will help estimate the cost.

faqs.Que: Can I hire a Vue.js Developer or a Vue.js development team separately?
faqs.Ans: Yes, you can hire either a single Vue.js developer or a full development team, depending on your project requirements. We offer flexible hiring models to fit your development needs.

faqs.Que: Is Vue.js suitable for large-scale applications?
faqs.Ans: Yes, Vue.js is highly scalable and can be used to build large-scale applications. Many organizations prefer Vue.js for its flexibility, performance, and ease of integration with other technologies.

faqs.Que: What are the key benefits of using Vue.js?
faqs.Ans: Vue.js is a progressive framework that is easy to learn, lightweight, and highly performant. It provides features like two-way data binding, reusable components, and an intuitive API, making it ideal for both small and large applications.

faqs.Que: What big companies use Vue.js ?
faqs.Ans: Alibaba, Xiaomi, GitLab, Behance and many more
